name: marlens-skills-rules-and-tools
description: Generic agent skills, rules, tool helpers, and OMP/Claude plugin adapters.

scripts.test: node --check bin/github-headless-session && node --check bin/github-review-thread && node scripts/verify-github-review-thread.mjs && node scripts/verify-github-body-file-writes.mjs && node scripts/verify-github-headless-session.mjs && node scripts/verify-skill-workflows.mjs && node scripts/verify-temporary-mcp-task.mjs && node scripts/verify-commit-scope-check.mjs && node scripts/verify-github-markdown-image-upload-helper.mjs && node scripts/verify-github-pr-screenshot-upload.mjs && node scripts/verify-agent-guidance-audit.mjs && node scripts/verify-omp-plugin-adapter.mjs && node scripts/verify-verifications.mjs

verifications.label: No Tracked Environment Example
verifications.description: Checks that the active Git project does not track .envrc.example files.
